pi_items.source: Task description explicitly instructs: 'Using Firefox, navigate to DigiKey (www.digikey.com)' and find components there
Task description explicitly requires: 'Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'BOM Research' containing the product page for each of the 3 components'
Task description requires creating 'a BOM report at ~/Documents/bom_report.json'; confirmed in export_result.sh line 18
Task description requires: 'Download the datasheet for the NE555P and save it to ~/Documents/NE555P_datasheet.pdf'; confirmed in export_result.sh line 19
DigiKey search confirmed NE555P part number 296-1411-5-ND (Texas Instruments NE555P PDIP-8 timer IC). URL: https://digikey.com/product-detail/en/texas-instruments/NE555P/296-1411-5-ND/277057
Component part number confirmed as NE555P (Texas Instruments product designation). Multiple sources confirm this is the standard part number.
DigiKey search result (1sourcecomponents.com) confirmed NE555P part 296-1411-5-ND available at $0.45000 per unit. This is within the claimed range of 0.20-2.00
Pricing research confirms reasonable upper limit. Arrow Electronics showed similar parts at $0.29-0.30, which is well below $2.00 upper bound.
Component part number is PN2222A (Bipolar NPN Transistor TO-92 package). Multiple DigiKey product pages confirm this part number format.
DigiKey search confirmed PN2222A variants available, with Findchips showing PN2222ABU at $0.30 per unit in stock (73,290 units available). This is within claimed range of 0.05-1.50.
Pricing research confirms reasonable upper limit for PN2222A variants across different manufacturers on DigiKey.

Specification requirement confirmed. DigiKey search results show multiple 10µF 25V electrolytic capacitors available (e.g., Panasonic EEU-FC1E102B, various manufacturers). Standard electronics notation.
Alternative notation for 10µF (microfarads) - standard variant without Unicode symbol. Widely used in component descriptions.

Task specifies '10uF Electrolytic Capacitor (Through Hole, >=25V, Cheapest In Stock)'. Verified through DigiKey search results showing availability of 10µF 25V rated capacitors (e.g., 25SEP10M by Panasonic, various KEMET options).

privileged_info_summary: The task directs users to research and source three real electronic components from DigiKey.com: (1) NE555P Timer IC (PDIP-8) with DigiKey part prefix '296-' and typical price $0.45 (within claimed range 0.20-2.00); (2) PN2222A NPN Transistor (TO-92) with typical price $0.30 (within claimed range 0.05-1.50); (3) 10µF Electrolytic Capacitor with minimum 25V rating, which are all real components available on DigiKey. The task requires creating a 'BOM Research' bookmark folder, downloading the NE555P datasheet (typical file sizes 300KB-2MB), and generating a JSON BOM report at /home/ga/Documents/bom_report.json. All metadata specifications have been verified against actual DigiKey component availability and pricing information.
